content.situation: 朋友在街头偶遇，轻松打招呼后想邀请对方参加一个轻松的聚会
content.speakerText: Hey! Long time no see! How's it going?
content.speakerTextCn: 嘿！好久不见！最近怎么样？
content.responseTemplate: Not bad! I've been swamped, but I'm always up for something fun. ___
content.hint: 用轻松反问开启邀请，保持对话自然流动
content.knowledgePoint: 自然开启邀请的口语表达

content.situation: 朋友回复了你的问候，你顺势发出聚会邀请，语气要随意但热情
content.speakerText: Yeah, I'm good! Just working a lot lately.
content.speakerTextCn: 还不错，最近就是忙工作。
content.responseTemplate: Totally get it. I'm hosting a casual get-together this week — ___
content.hint: 朋友间邀请常用口语缩略形式，避免正式用语
content.knowledgePoint: 非正式邀请的常用口语结构

content.situation: 对方欣然接受邀请，你希望回应得热情且自然
content.speakerText: Oh, that sounds awesome! I'm free that night.
content.speakerTextCn: 哦，听起来太棒了！那天我有空。

blanks.answer: I'd love to have you there!
options: I'd love to have you there!

content.hint: 热情回应邀请时，用表达欢迎的句式增强友好氛围
content.knowledgePoint: 积极回应邀请的友好表达
